_comment: Demo05 per-turn DAG template. ONE llm_call node with a STABLE node id ('assistant') so conversation memory persists across run_dag calls keyed by (agent_session_id, node_id) — see colmena docs 15_memory_guide.md. The handler (tasks/task05.py) fills the ${...} placeholders, attaches the report via files[] ONLY on turn 0, and calls run_dag(dag, None, None, None, True, session_id) every turn with the same session_id. The generate_chart tool is a python_script with FIXED code that returns the base64 PNG data URI; Colmena's always-on tool-output scrubber elides it to '[binary elided: ...]' before it ever reaches the LLM context (dag_tool_executor.rs scrub_value_for_llm).

generate_chart.name: generate_chart
generate_chart.description: Generate a chart image from a natural-language description. Returns the chart as a base64 PNG data URI.

description.description: Natural-language description of the chart to generate.
